$comment: The fixed prompt set for the answer-volatility series. It is published here, in the repo, before any run, so that nobody (including us) can select prompts after seeing results. Changing this file starts a new series with a new version number; it never edits an existing one.

prompts.text: Recommend the best SEO tools. Give a short list of brand names.
Which tools track whether AI assistants mention my brand? Give a short list of brand names.
Recommend the best CRM for a small business. Give a short list of brand names.
Recommend the best running shoes for a marathon. Give a short list of brand names.
Recommend the best UK energy suppliers. Give a short list of brand names.
Recommend the best project management software. Give a short list of brand names.
